channel.title: Claude on AI Blog Factory
channel.description: Recent content in Claude on AI Blog Factory

item.title: Claude vs ChatGPT vs Gemini for Coding in 2026: Which AI Should You Actually Use?
item.description: A hands-on comparison of Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini for coding. See which AI writes better code, debugs faster, and helps you learn programming faster as a student.

item.title: ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini: Which AI Assistant Is Actually Best in 2026?
item.description: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini — which AI assistant should you actually use in 2026? We compared all three on 10 factors so you don't have to waste time figuring it out.
